title: Greysound — AI-Powered Music Creation in Your Browser
text:
Studio quality music.
Human-made, AI-assisted.
A music production studio that engineers itself, so you can focus on the creative part.
Here from
Product Hunt
? Make sure to redeem your 50% off promo code!
Start Creating — It's Free
See What Users Are Making
Come as you are
From pro audio engineers to vibe musicians, Greysound meets you where you are.
Pro Engineer
Amateur Engineer
Pro Musician
Vibe Musician
Select your role to see what Greysound can do for you
=
Your AI Assistant Engineer
Automate the tedious,
focus on the craft
Stop wasting hours on repetitive tasks. Greysound handles phase-aligning tracks, deleting silence from long regions + adding fades, and other tedious work — so you can focus on the creative decisions that matter.
Automatic phase detection and correction across tracks
AI-powered noise removal and audio cleanup
Batch process stems with intelligent gain staging
Supercharge Your Workflow
Change role to see Greysound in action
Everything you need to make music
Professional tools, intelligent assistance, zero friction. From first idea to finished
        track.
AI CoProducer
Chat with an intelligent assistant that understands music. Generate melodies, drum patterns, and full arrangements through natural conversation.
AI Stem Splitting
Import reference tracks, and have AI split it into its component instruments to train your producer ear and improve your skills as a musician.
AI Sample Synthesis
Generate samples, loops and effects with AI instead of spending hours digging through sample libraries.
Mixing + Effects
Full mixing console with EQ, compression, reverb, and more. Master your tracks without leaving the browser.
Virtual Instruments
Synthesizers, samplers, and drum machines built right in. No plugins to install, no configuration needed.
MIDI Generation
Let AI compose basslines, chord progressions, and melodies. Edit every note to make it uniquely yours.
Founder-led support
Dissatisfied?
I'll hear you out live.
Hi! I'm Anshu, the creator of Greysound.
If you tried Greysound and weren't a 100% impressed (missing features, bugs, etc.), book a
        1-on-1 with me. I'll walk you through the product, answer every question, and personally
        make sure Greysound supports your workflow. If it's missing something,
I'll fix it asap and get back to you
.
No sales team, no scripts. Just the person who built it, betting their time on winning you
        over.
Book a 1:1 with me
Make music for free.
Only pay for AI assistance.
Record, edit, arrange, mix, and save projects with all non-AI features free forever. You
        only pay when you want AI credits for sample generation, stem splitting, CoProducer
        assistance, and other AI-powered workflows.
